heading: Teaching & Education Core
title: C Instructor
shortDesc: Teach fundamentals of C programming for absolute beginners.
longDesc: As an instructor, you will teach C programming from basics including syntax, memory concepts, and problem-solving approaches for beginner students.
responsibilities: Conduct coding exercises and beginner projects.

heading: Teaching & Education Core
title: Core Java Instructor
shortDesc: Teach Core Java concepts including OOP and real-world applications.
longDesc: Responsible for teaching Java programming with focus on OOP, collections, multithreading, and backend fundamentals.
responsibilities: Teach Core Java and OOP concepts.
Guide students in Java-based mini projects.

heading: Teaching & Education Core
title: Python with ML Instructor
shortDesc: Teach Python programming and Machine Learning fundamentals.
longDesc: You will teach Python from basics to advanced ML concepts including data preprocessing, model building, and evaluation techniques.
responsibilities: Teach Python programming and ML concepts.

heading: Teaching & Education Core
title: DSA using Java Instructor
shortDesc: Teach Data Structures and Algorithms using Java.
longDesc: Focus on problem-solving, competitive programming, and DSA concepts using Java with real interview-level questions.

heading: Teaching & Education Core
title: HTML & CSS Instructor
shortDesc: Teach web design fundamentals using HTML and CSS.
longDesc: Responsible for teaching structure, styling, and responsive web design principles for beginners.
responsibilities: Teach HTML structure and CSS styling.
Guide students in web design basics.

heading: Teaching & Education Core
title: JavaScript Instructor
shortDesc: Teach JavaScript fundamentals and modern ES6+ concepts.
longDesc: Covers JavaScript basics to advanced concepts including DOM, async programming, and APIs.
responsibilities: Guide DOM manipulation and async programming.
